title: Miami MFA emails (House 2026; selected via Grok)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

Emails sent to or from* any of the officials (and/or their staffers) listed below and any email address ending with mfa.gov.il or gov.il:

•  Daniel Perez
•  Tyler Sirois 
•  Chuck Brannan
•  Hillary Cassel
•  Yvette Benarroch
•  Mike Caruso
•  Peggy Gossett-Seidman
•  Chip LaMarca
•  Michelle Salzman
•  Debra Tendrich
•  Mitch Rosenwald
•  Kelly Skidmore
•  Allison Tant
•  Katherine Waldron
•  Jeff Holcomb
•  Michael Gottlieb
•  Jennifer Canady
•  Vicki Lopez
•  Robbie Brackett
•  Tiffany Esposito

* By "sent to," I also mean emails CC'd or BCC'd to the people named.

You may limit the search to the dates between 1 January 2026 and the date this request is processed.

If any emails contain attachments, please include those attachments as well. If some portions of the requested records are properly exempt from disclosure, please disclose any reasonably segregable non-exempt portions of the requested records.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Matthew Petti

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: National Climate Assessment (Department of Commerce)
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I request all communications between this agency and the White House, Executive Office of the President, Office of Management and Budget, Office of Science and Technology Policy, Council on Environmental Quality, or Department of Government Efficiency concerning the National Climate Assessment, globalchange.gov, USGCRP, climate webpages, climate datasets, climate reports, or public access to climate science materials.

Please include emails, calendar invitations, attachments, memoranda, Teams/Slack messages, briefing materials, and meeting notes.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Lauren Pearle

communications.subject: Request Received by DOI FOIA Office
communications.communication:
Dear Lauren Pearle,

We would like to inform you that the Department of the Interior has received your SOL FOIA request and assigned it the control number DOI-2026-006558. Please reference this number in any future communications regarding your request.

This message has been sent from an unattended email inbox. For any further correspondence, please contact the bureau at https://www.doi.gov/foia/contacts.

Below is a copy of the Request Description:

To Whom It May Concern: Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records: I request all communications between this agency and the White House, Executive Office of the President, Office of Management and Budget, Office of Science and Technology Policy, Council on Environmental Quality, or Department of Government Efficiency concerning the National Climate Assessment, globalchange.gov, USGCRP, climate webpages, climate datasets, climate reports, or public access to climate science materials. Please include emails, calendar invitations, attachments, memoranda, Teams/Slack messages, briefing materials, and meeting notes. The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes. In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not. Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires. Sincerely, Lauren Pearle Upload documents directly: https://www.muckrock.com/respond/2298416/

Thank you for your attention to this matter.
Regards,
DOI FOIA Office
